title: primeo
text:
This is a Quarto website.

library(tidyverse)

✔ ggplot2   4.0.2     ✔ tibble    3.3.1

✔ purrr     1.2.2     
── Conflicts ────────────────────────────────────────── tidyverse_conflicts() ──

✖ dplyr::lag()    masks stats::lag()
ℹ Use the conflicted package (<http://conflicted.r-lib.org/>) to force all conflicts to become errors

library(readxl)
df <- read_excel("data.xlsx")
tree <- df %>%
  distinct(col1, col2, col3, col4) %>%
  arrange(col1, col2, col3, col4)
print_tree <- function(df) {
  for (l1 in unique(df$col1)) {
    cat(l1, "\n")
    
    df1 <- df[df$col1 == l1, ]
    
    for (l2 in unique(df1$col2)) {
      cat("  -", l2, "\n")
      
      df2 <- df1[df1$col2 == l2, ]
      
      for (l3 in unique(df2$col3)) {
        cat("      -", l3, "\n")
      }
        df3 <- df2[df2$col3 == l3, ]
        
        for (l4 in unique(df3$col4)) {
          cat("      -", l4, "\n")
      }
    }
  }
}
print_tree(tree)
